name: orcid_researcher_scraper
title: ORCID Researcher Scraper
description: Search public ORCID registry records or fetch one exact ORCID iD through the official ORCID Public API, returning researcher identifiers, profile URLs, public names, biography, keywords, researcher URLs, external identifiers, affiliation summaries, activity counts, and record timestamps.

seo.title: ORCID Researcher Scraper Tool for Public Researcher Profiles
seo.description: Search ORCID public registry records or fetch exact ORCID iDs with Better Fetch via the official ORCID Public API, including profile URLs, public names, biography, keywords, external identifiers, affiliations, activity counts, and record timestamps.
seo.intro: ORCID Researcher Scraper gives agents a reliable public-API route into ORCID registry data. Search by ORCID query syntax, given name, family name, affiliation, or keyword, or fetch a known ORCID iD such as 0000-0002-1825-0097. The tool normalizes ORCID JSON into compact researcher records with canonical ORCID URLs, public names, biography text, other names, keyword labels, researcher URLs, external identifiers, employment and education summaries, work and funding counts, claimed status, and modification timestamps. It is designed for scholarly CRM enrichment, institution researcher discovery, grant and publication workflow automation, RAG source attribution, author disambiguation, and research-agent pipelines that need public ORCID metadata without browser scraping.

useCases.title: Researcher disambiguation
useCases.description: Search public ORCID records by name, affiliation, or keyword, then capture canonical ORCID iDs and profile URLs for downstream matching.

useCases.title: Academic CRM enrichment
useCases.description: Fetch one public ORCID record and return public profile fields, external identifiers, researcher URLs, affiliations, and activity counts.

useCases.title: Literature workflow automation
useCases.description: Attach public ORCID identifiers to author, grant, or publication workflows before deeper Crossref, PubMed, arXiv, or institutional enrichment.

faqs.question: Does ORCID Researcher Scraper require an API key?
faqs.answer: No. Version 0.1 uses the official ORCID Public API for public search and public record reads. It does not require ORCID member API credentials.

faqs.question: Can it read private or limited-access ORCID data?
faqs.answer: No. It only retrieves public data returned by the ORCID Public API. It does not use an authenticated member API token and cannot access private, trusted-party, or limited-access record fields.

faqs.question: Is this tool affiliated with ORCID?
faqs.answer: No. ORCID and the ORCID iD icon are trademarks of ORCID, Inc. This tool uses public ORCID API data and is not endorsed by or affiliated with ORCID.

mode.description: Search public ORCID records or fetch one exact ORCID iD.

orcid_id.description: Exact ORCID iD or ORCID URL, e.g. 0000-0002-1825-0097 or https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1825-0097.

query.description: Raw ORCID public search query, e.g. family-name:Smith AND given-names:John.

given_names.description: Given name text to search with the ORCID given-names field.

family_name.description: Family name text to search with the ORCID family-name field.

affiliation.description: Affiliation or organization text to search with ORCID affiliation-org-name.

keyword.description: Keyword text to search with ORCID keyword metadata.

rows.description: Maximum researcher identifiers to return in search mode.

include_biography.description: Include public biography text in record mode when ORCID returns it.

orcid_id.description: Exact ORCID iD used in record mode

total_matches.description: Total ORCID search matches reported by the API

host.description: ORCID host returned by the API

works_count.description: Number of public work groups in the ORCID activities summary

funding_count.description: Number of public funding groups in the ORCID activities summary

peer_review_count.description: Number of public peer-review groups in the ORCID activities summary

claimed.description: Whether ORCID reports the record as claimed
